name: oh-my-scholar
description: Academic paper DOMAIN (not a work-style lane). Route here FIRST whenever the work product is an academic paper — LaTeX .tex / .bib, related-work survey, concept notes, outline, draft, inspect, venue mock-review, verify, revise. Because the domain is unambiguous, this takes precedence over the work-style lanes (omc/sp/omx): paper work ALWAYS enters oms, which then picks the exact scholar-* STAGE. The citation-integrity guardrails (no fabricated citations, no embedding retrieval, draft is single-careful never parallel) only exist inside oms — so paper work must not be handled directly or run as a raw OMC parallel sweep. Heavy SUB-tasks inside oms (multi-source literature search, test-first tooling code) may still re-route to omc/sp, but citation-bound source research must NOT use OMC parallel.

skills.name: academic-paper-domain
skills.description: Representative signals that route to oh-my-scholar (the session then picks the exact scholar-* STAGE).
examples: 논문 써줘 / 논문 초안 작성 / 섹션 초안
survey related work and find the research gap
outline the paper structure / story arc
내 논문 IROS/NeurIPS 기준으로 모의심사 받고 싶어
인용 검증 / 컴파일 체크 / 논문 게이트
start a new paper (bootstrap the directory + venue)
